generated_assessment.reasoning: As a highly extraverted and conscientious individual, this person likely values proactive and decisive action in national security. Her moderate openness to experience and low tender-mindedness indicate a pragmatic, tough-minded approach to defense policy. The combination of high assertiveness and low anger/hostility suggests she would favor strategic autonomy not out of aggression but as a calculated measure to protect national interests.
